context: Tests whether the agent handles PermissionKit availability, setup, and iMessage-only communication routing accurately.

checklist.name: Core 26.0 APIs
checklist.description: States that core PermissionKit topic, handle, question, response, choice, and CommunicationLimits APIs are available starting in iOS/iPadOS 26.0.

checklist.name: Later 26.x APIs
checklist.description: States that AskError starts in iOS/iPadOS 26.1 and AskCenter, ask/responses, PermissionButton, and SignificantAppUpdateTopic require iOS/iPadOS 26.2 or availability checks.

checklist.name: iMessage limitation
checklist.description: Says PermissionKit communication experiences are available only through iMessage and cannot be routed through an arbitrary in-app DM system.

checklist.name: No invented entitlement
checklist.description: Rejects the custom PermissionKit entitlement and tells the team to verify current Apple docs/Xcode capabilities instead of inventing signing keys.

checklist.name: Boundary preserved
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on PermissionKit rather than expanding into general chat moderation or family-account architecture.
